positive: Stylized, whimsical forest canopy pattern, featuring bioluminescent fauna and flora. Central arrangement of glowing deep blue mushrooms, stylized golden mandalas, and intricate fractal leaves suspended in a cosmic forest mist. The color palette must be rich jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted sharply against deep, velvety black silhouettes. Emphasize clean, graphic outlines and high contrast, ideal for repeat apparel printing. Cinematic lighting, detailed cross-hatching, vector illustration style, symmetrical composition, highly detailed, art deco meets naturalism.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, realism, gradient fade, messy, disorganized
